pages.name: Dashboard (Web)
components: dashboard-card (x14 instances — Task Summary, Thermal, Agents, Activity, Charts, etc.)
table-row (agents, audit trail, file access log)

pages.name: Launcher (Desktop — CustomTkinter)
pages.description: Native dark-mode desktop app, brick theme
components: chat-bubbles (provider-colored: Ollama gold, Claude blue, Gemini green)

figma_import_instructions: 1. Import design-tokens.json as Figma Variables (Plugins → Tokens Studio or Variables import)
2. Drag SVGs into Figma canvas — they are pre-colored with exact production values
3. Convert each SVG to a Figma Component (right-click → Create Component)
4. Create two Color Modes: 'Classic' and 'Modern' using the theme token sets
5. Set up typography styles matching the font-size tokens
6. Copy icon_1024.png into Figma as a raster asset for the app icon
8. Assemble components following the layout descriptions above
